title: The Weekly Challenge - 108
task1_desc: Write a script to declare a variable or constant and print it's location in the memory.
task1_body: Write a script to declare a variable or constant and print it's location in the memory.
task2_desc: Write a script to display top 10 `Bell Numbers`. Please refer to [wikipedia page](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bell_number) for more informations.
